# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
        timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
    }

    parameters {
        text(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'One artifact URL per line. Supports http(s), s3://, and Artifactory URLs.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TARGET_HOSTS',
            defaultValue: 'prod-app-01,prod-app-02',
            description: 'Comma-separated production hosts.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/releases',
            description: 'Remote deployment directory.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SERVICE_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'myapp',
            description: 'Service to restart after deployment.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: 'prod-ssh',
            description: 'Jenkins SSH credentials ID for production hosts.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional Jenkins username/password credentials ID for HTTP/Artifactory downloads.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional Jenkins AWS credentials ID for s3 downloads.'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_STRATEGY',
            choices: ['copy-all', 'single-bundle'],
            description: 'copy-all: copy each artifact to release dir; single-bundle: require exactly one artifact and unpack if archive.'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'CLEAN_REMOTE_RELEASE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Clean remote release directory before deployment.'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'UNPACK_ARCHIVES',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Unpack .zip/.tar/.tar.gz/.tgz archives during deployment.'
        )
    }

    environment {
        WORK_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/downloaded_artifacts"
        RELEASE_ID = "${env.BUILD_TAG}".replaceAll('[^A-Za-z0-9._-]', '_')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS
                        .split('\n')
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    if (urls.isEmpty()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URLS must contain at least one URL.')
                    }

                    def hosts = params.TARGET_HOSTS
                        .split(',')
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    if (hosts.isEmpty()) {
                        error('TARGET_HOSTS must contain at least one host.')
                    }

                    if (params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY == 'single-bundle' && urls.size() != 1) {
                        error('single-bundle strategy requires exactly one artifact URL.')
                    }

                    sh """
                        set -eux
                        rm -rf '${env.WORK_DIR}'
                        mkdir -p '${env.WORK_DIR}'
                    """

                    writeFile file: "${env.WORKSPACE}/artifact_urls.txt", text: urls.join('\n') + '\n'
                    writeFile file: "${env.WORKSPACE}/target_hosts.txt", text: hosts.join('\n') + '\n'
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = readFile("${env.WORKSPACE}/artifact_urls.txt")
                        .split('\n')
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    def httpCreds = params.HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()
                    def awsCreds = params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()

                    urls.eachWithIndex { url, idx ->
                        def safeName = url.tokenize('/').last()?.trim()
                        if (!safeName) {
                            safeName = "artifact_${idx + 1}"
                        }
                        safeName = safeName.replaceAll(/\?.*$/, '')
                        if (!safeName) {
                            safeName = "artifact_${idx + 1}"
                        }

                        def outFile = "${env.WORK_DIR}/${idx + 1}_${safeName}"

                        if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                            if (!awsCreds) {
                                error("AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID is required for S3 URL: ${url}")
                            }
                            withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding', credentialsId: awsCreds]]) {
                                sh """
                                    set -eux
                                    aws s3 cp '${url}' '${outFile}'
                                """
                            }
                        } else if (url.startsWith('http://') || url.startsWith('https://')) {
                            if (httpCreds) {
                                withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: httpCreds, usernameVariable: 'HTTP_USER', passwordVariable: 'HTTP_PASS')]) {
                                    sh """
                                        set -eux
                                        curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 -u "\$HTTP_USER:\$HTTP_PASS" -o '${outFile}' '${url}'
                                    """
                                }
                            } else {
                                sh """
                                    set -eux
                                    curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 -o '${outFile}' '${url}'
                                """
                            }
                        } else {
                            error("Unsupported URL scheme for artifact: ${url}")
                        }
                    }

                    sh """
                        set -eux
                        ls -lah '${env.WORK_DIR}'
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Release Package') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh """
                        set -eux
                        mkdir -p '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload'
                        rm -rf '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload'/*
                    """

                    def files = sh(
                        script: "find '${env.WORK_DIR}' -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().split('\n').findAll { it?.trim() }

                    if (files.isEmpty()) {
                        error('No downloaded artifacts found.')
                    }

                    if (params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY == 'single-bundle') {
                        def f = files[0]
                        if (params.UNPACK_ARCHIVES && (f.endsWith('.zip') || f.endsWith('.tar') || f.endsWith('.tar.gz') || f.endsWith('.tgz'))) {
                            if (f.endsWith('.zip')) {
                                sh """
                                    set -eux
                                    unzip -oq '${f}' -d '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload'
                                """
                            } else {
                                sh """
                                    set -eux
                                    tar -xf '${f}' -C '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload'
                                """
                            }
                        } else {
                            sh """
                                set -eux
                                cp '${f}' '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload/'
                            """
                        }
                    } else {
                        files.each { f ->
                            if (params.UNPACK_ARCHIVES && (f.endsWith('.zip') || f.endsWith('.tar') || f.endsWith('.tar.gz') || f.endsWith('.tgz'))) {
                                def targetDir = "${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload/${new File(f).getName()}.d"
                                sh """
                                    set -eux
                                    mkdir -p '${targetDir}'
                                """
                                if (f.endsWith('.zip')) {
                                    sh """
                                        set -eux
                                        unzip -oq '${f}' -d '${targetDir}'
                                    """
                                } else {
                                    sh """
                                        set -eux
                                        tar -xf '${f}' -C '${targetDir}'
                                    """
                                }
                            } else {
                                sh """
                                    set -eux
                                    cp '${f}' '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload/'
                                """
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    sh """
                        set -eux
                        find '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload' -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 5 -print | sed 's#^#PAYLOAD: #'
                        tar -czf '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload.tgz' -C '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload' .
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def hosts = readFile("${env.WORKSPACE}/target_hosts.txt")
                        .split('\n')
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        hosts.each { host ->
                            sh """
                                set -eux
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${host}' "mkdir -p '${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${env.RELEASE_ID}'"
                                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload.tgz' '${host}:/tmp/${env.RELEASE_ID}.tgz'
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${host}' '
                                    set -eu
                                    RELEASE_DIR="${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${env.RELEASE_ID}"
                                    mkdir -p "\$RELEASE_DIR"
                                    ${params.CLEAN_REMOTE_RELEASE ? 'rm -rf "$RELEASE_DIR"/*' : 'true'}
                                    tar -xzf "/tmp/${env.RELEASE_ID}.tgz" -C "\$RELEASE_DIR"
                                    ln -sfn "\$RELEASE_DIR" "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/current"
                                    rm -f "/tmp/${env.RELEASE_ID}.tgz"
                                    if command -v sudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                                      sudo systemctl restart "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                      sudo systemctl is-active "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                    else
                                      systemctl restart "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                      systemctl is-active "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                    fi
                                '
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully: release=${env.RELEASE_ID}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment failed."
        }
        always {
            sh """
                set +e
                rm -rf '${env.WORK_DIR}' '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload' '${env.WORKSPACE}/release_payload.tgz'
            """
        }
    }
}
